senses.gloss: a deputy, a vicar, a substitute, a representative

etymology.text: فَعِيل (faʕīl)-type stative-verb active participle from the verb خَلَفَ (ḵalafa, “to be the successor, to substitute for”), with unexpected feminine ending, from the root خ ل ف (ḵ l f); literally, "successor, substitute".
